metadata.notes: Thailand domestic flights are the primary intercity transport for distances over 3hrs. Overnight buses and trains available for budget travellers. Island destinations require ferry. All times in hours.

transport_modes.flight: Domestic flight (AirAsia, Bangkok Airways, Thai Lion)
transport_modes.bus: Express bus or VIP overnight bus
transport_modes.train: State Railway of Thailand (slower but scenic)
transport_modes.flight_then_ferry: Fly to nearest airport then ferry to island
